subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Kingdom of God! A long time hath elapsed, and yet no ear hath been gladdened by the warbling of the nightingale [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ملکوت الله قد مضت مده مدیده و لم تلتذ المسامع باستماع نغمات الصافور
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @growth of the Cause, @entry by troops, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
